name: S-4 --link-to emits a markdown link to the coverage matrix file in the audit report per the gap analyzer
command:
printf -- '- id: g
  fetch_frequency: daily
' > cat.yaml && mkdir -p tree/g && printf 'source:
  id: g
rules:
  - {id: r, provenance: [{source: g}]}
' > tree/g/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-audit.sh" --emit r.md --catalog cat.yaml --tree tree --link-to COVERAGE.md && grep -q '\[COVERAGE.md\](COVERAGE.md)' r.md && echo linked 1>&2
